description: Migration success was validated, but rollback or roll-forward recovery was never tested.
body: Failure mode: a migration applies successfully in the forward direction but cannot be reversed after a later failure, leaving schema and code out of sync. Diagnostic trigger: validation report includes only migrate-up output and no down migration, restore, or roll-forward procedure. Do-not-use signal: do not mark migration validation complete without recovery evidence or an explicit irreversible-change approval. Recovery: run down migration on disposable data, test restore from snapshot, or document and test a roll-forward correction. Risk boundary: lossy transformations and destructive cleanup require stronger approval than additive schema changes.
